shared_attributes.purpose: provide spatial context and visual feedback
shared_attributes.rendering: background layers, no collision with player
shared_attributes.scrolling: parallax or synchronized with game speed

context.role: Decorative background element providing depth through parallax
context.screen_position: y=10-40px (random), scrolls from right to left
context.usage_scenario: Optional decorative element, spawns every 5-10 seconds with 30% probability, scrolls at 50% of Current_Speed

animation.description: Static sprite, scrolls left at Current_Speed * 0.5 for parallax effect, despawns at x < -100px

visual_specification.details: Simple rounded cloud shape, minimal pixel art style, low visual prominence

relationships.shared_with: Same visual style and scrolling behavior as cloud_large, only size differs
relationships.differences_from: cloud_large is 92x27px (double size), both scroll at 50% speed vs ground at 100%

explicit_negations: No complex cloud details or texture
